form.formComment: On a four run winning streak. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 1.75 len at Sirinyer All Weather March 5 over 2000m defeating Haremli Kiz with 56kg at $1.05. Before that favourite; scored a big 14 len win at Sirinyer All Weather February 13 over 1600m defeating Kivilcim Atesi carrying 50kg at $1.05. Rates highly. Big chance.
